mapper.sql: plan_id, plan_name, planned_total_item_qty, actual_total_item_qty, avg_item_support_rate, planned_total_container_qty, actual_total_container_qty, avg_filled_container_fill_rate, plan_status, need_update, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan ( plan_name, planned_total_item_qty, actual_total_item_qty, avg_item_support_rate, planned_total_container_qty, actual_total_container_qty, avg_filled_container_fill_rate, plan_status, need_update ) VALUES ( #{planName}, #{plannedTotalItemQty}, #{actualTotalItemQty}, #{avgItemSupportRate}, #{plannedTotalContainerQty}, #{actualTotalContainerQty}, #{avgFilledContainerFillRate}, #{planStatus}, #{needUpdate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE plan SET plan_name = #{planName}, planned_total_item_qty = #{plannedTotalItemQty}, actual_total_item_qty = #{actualTotalItemQty}, avg_item_support_rate = #{avgItemSupportRate}, planned_total_container_qty = #{plannedTotalContainerQty}, actual_total_container_qty = #{actualTotalContainerQty}, avg_filled_container_fill_rate = #{avgFilledContainerFillRate}, plan_status = #{planStatus}, need_update = #{needUpdate} WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM plan ORDER BY plan_id DESC
